strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience significantly exceeds the 15-year minimum, with consistent technical IC progression
Demonstrated thought leadership and ability to inspire others through founding GISCollective (2016-present), creating open-source libraries, and leading workshops on testing and system design
Recent engagement with cutting-edge infrastructure (MCP, Model Context Protocol) at re:cinq shows awareness of AI-agent workflows
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms built; current AI work is infrastructure-focused (MCP code generators) rather than product or customer-facing
No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field; background is general software engineering without specialized AI study or research credentials
No evidence of advising strategic customers or enterprise partners on AI adoption; roles have been individual contributor-focused rather than strategic advisory

key_factors.factor: No strategic customer advisory track record

response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable software engineer with 19 years of diverse technical experience and proven ability to lead and inspire (GISCollective, teaching workshops). However, the Principal Engineer role is explicitly focused on 'AI Strategy' with responsibilities including identifying strategic AI opportunities, advising customers on AI adoption, and building AI products. His current work on MCP infrastructure is recent but represents tooling, not AI products or customer engagement. Critically, the resume shows no shipped AI/ML products, no specialized AI education (Master's/PhD preferred), and no evidence of the strategic partnership and customer advisory work that defines 80% of this role's responsibilities. He would be overqualified for a senior IC platform role but underqualified for a principal-level AI strategy position.
